name: quickrest
description: Paid API proxy platform for combining upstream APIs and selling access through credits.

scripts.check: DATABASE_URL=postgres://quickrest:quickrest@localhost:5432/quickrest REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379 SESSION_SECRET=dev-check-secret-change-before-prod bun -e "await import('./src/server.js'); const { redis } = await import('./src/lib/redis.js'); const { pool } = await import('./src/db/postgres.js'); redis.disconnect(); await pool.end();"
